title: bellis sylvestris var. pappulosa
intro: Bellis sylvestris var. pappulosa, also known as the hairy daisy or pappulosa daisy, is a rare variety of the daisy plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Bellis sylvestris var. pappulosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat wounds, and relieve digestive issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health concerns. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and its leaves and flowers can also be used in herbal preparations such as salves and ointments.
